description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and no additional services. Define a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq and installs build-essential, libsdl2-dev, libsdl2-gfx-dev, libsdl2-image-dev, libsdl2-ttf-dev, and cmake. Add a build job in the build stage that executes make. The pipeline does not define caches, artifacts, or any conditional rules.
